replies.msg:
香港好少in-house m&a (technically 叫corp dev), 所以少料唔出奇
有野隨便問
條team 就9成ex-banker 加d ex-lawyer, career prospect 有幾個:
1. 直上head of corp dev (可能要等好多年, 上面唔走就冇計)
2. 轉做business unit d finance 頭 / cfo
3. 轉做business ops
通常你IBD 果時係咩sector , corp dev 就interview 返果個sector, 因為有時係client / 你MD識人, 所以place 入去易好多. 如果係M&A generalist 就入咩sector 既corp dev 都ok 既, 除左好specialized 果堆 (FIG, RE, energy)
